{{Quote|It is my pleasure to be assigned to the Sith ruins, to study their past and unearth new relics.|translated=1|Tariga to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Tariga''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] raised on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. She spoke the [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'lek language]] rather than [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] as her [[Language/Legends|native tongue]]. She was a [[Sith acolyte/Legends|student]] at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] [[3956 BBY]]. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] had found the [[Star Map]] he was searching for on Korriban and killed [[Uthar Wynn]], the master of the academy, Tariga turned on Revan, like the other students and guards, when Revan entered the Sith Academy. However, they were all [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Look for Tariga… she is in that area and can probably help you.|Tamlen referred to Tariga using she/her pronouns.|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
Tariga appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. [[Tamlen]], another non-player character refers to Tariga using she/her pronouns in dialogue, which this article assumes was intended. While dialogue states that Tariga speaks the Twi'lek language, she speaks in the [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]] spoken by other [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] non-player characters.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
